616 EDPS - Education Policy Studies

EDMS747 Design of Program Evaluations (3 Credits)

Analysis of measurement and design problems in program evaluations. Prerequisite: EDMS626, EDMS651, and EDMS647. Or permission

of instructor; and permission of EDUC-Human Development and Quantitative Methodology department.

EDMS769 Special Topics in Applied Statistics in Education (1-4 Credits) Designed primarily for students majoring or minoring in measurement, statistics or evaluation.
